next_action: Phase approved. Commit the staged phase-3 version bump, then keep tag, publish, release, and main integration behind their separate control points.

observations.detail: Staged scope is limited to `package.json` and `package-lock.json`, matching the phase-3 separation requirement.
`package.json`, package-lock root `.version`, and `package-lock.json#packages[""].version` all resolve to `0.3.1`. No tag points at HEAD.
`npm run typecheck` passed, and `git diff --cached --check` reported no whitespace errors.
